creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 214124
svn diff: changes MASTER_SITES distinfo

This port is marked BROKEN because the URL in
MASTER_SITES went missing.
The attached svn diff replaces URL in MASTER_SITES
for the correct one.

MASTER_SITES
BROKEN

distinfo

NOTE: if the current maintainer is un(able|interested)
in maintaining this port. I'll take it.

Thanks! That's it.

--Chris
